title: Simple Compass HUD
description: A lightweight HUD mod that displays a smooth compass on screen.
body:
# Simple Compass HUD

A lightweight Fabric client-side mod that adds a smooth and minimal **compass HUD** to your Minecraft screen.  
The compass shows cardinal directions (N, S, E, W) and diagonals, with smooth movement based on player yaw.

---

## ✨ Features
- Clean and minimal compass bar at the top of the screen.
- Smooth yaw interpolation for natural HUD movement.
- Cardinal and diagonal points (N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, W, NW).
- Highlighted **North (N)** in red for easy orientation.
- Lightweight rendering – negligible performance impact.

---

## 📦 Requirements
- **Minecraft:** 1.21.6 - 1.21.8
- **Fabric Loader:** >=0.17.2
- **Fabric API:** ~0.128.2

---

## 🔗 Notes
- Client-side only (no server installation required).
- Can be combined with other HUD or minimap mods without conflicts.
